pageContext.name: Piccolo
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Bandai Spirits Ichibansho are proud to announce their newest release, Piccolo, from the newest anime show Dragon Ball Super Hero!  This figure is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Piccolo from the new respective anime. Standing at approximately 7.5' tall, Piccolo is seen in his popular pose.  Be sure to collect this demon king and enhance your display with other incredible Ichibansho and Dragon Ball figures!
